summary: Tested Dashboard redesign at /dashboard. All KPI cards, finance panel, navigation and layout verified. Dashboard loads correctly after login with gradient cards (teal, orange, purple, pink). All data-testid attributes present. Navigation flows work correctly.

issues: Theme toggle (moon icon at bottom-left sidebar) is small and hard to discover — not a bug but UX note

seed_data_creation: None (DB empty as expected, all values show 0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard redesign fully validated. 4 KPI cards (kpi-total-produtos teal, kpi-movimentacoes orange, kpi-vencimentos purple, kpi-estoque-baixo pink) all present with correct data-testid. Finance panel (finance-summary-panel) shows Entradas/Saidas/Lucro Liquido. Recent movements section (recent-movements-card) present. Clicking kpi-total-produtos navigates to /products. 'Ver relatorios' button navigates to /financeiro/relatorios. Theme toggle exists in sidebar bottom-left.
